meta.scope: A-layer iPSC suspension/aggregate bioreactor: PINN, digital twin, hybrid ODE+NN, uncertainty quantification, and multi-fidelity BO integration

nodes.label: Physics-Informed Neural Network (PINN)
nodes.content: Neural network trained with both data loss and physics loss (ODE/PDE residuals). For iPSC suspension/aggregate bioreactors, PINNs are a future-phase technology; most published examples are CHO/microbial, not directly transferable to iPSC.

nodes.label: Digital Twin (DT)
nodes.content: Virtual replica of the bioreactor process that predicts concentration/state profiles and supports what-if analysis. Industrial examples (Yokogawa Insilico) are CHO/mAb-centric; iPSC aggregate-specific DTs are not yet established.

nodes.label: Hybrid ODE + Neural Network model
nodes.content: Mechanistic ODE structure (mass balances) with kinetic terms represented or corrected by neural networks. More data-efficient than pure NN and a realistic Phase 2/3 extension of the Manstein ODE plant_model.

nodes.label: PINN-based Model Predictive Control
nodes.content: MPC that uses a PINN as the prediction model instead of a numerical ODE. Demonstrated in microbial/CHO contexts; iPSC applicability is unverified and should remain advisory/Human-on-the-loop.

nodes.label: Uncertainty Quantification (UQ) for learned models
nodes.content: Quantification of epistemic and aleatoric uncertainty in PINN/NN/DT predictions, typically expressed as 95% confidence intervals. Required for Human-on-the-loop escalation when model confidence is low.

nodes.label: Deep Ensemble UQ
nodes.content: Multiple independently trained networks whose prediction distribution defines mean and variance. Simplest practical UQ method for hybrid ODE+NN models.

nodes.label: Bayesian PINN (B-PINN)
nodes.content: Variational inference over PINN weights to produce posterior predictive distributions. Theoretically grounded but computationally expensive and prior-dependent.

nodes.label: EFI-based UQ for PINN
nodes.content: Extended Fiducial Inference for PINNs. Avoids subjective priors/dropout rates by solving data-generating equations; shown to achieve ~95% coverage on synthetic PDEs, but unverified on bioreactor time series.

nodes.label: MC Dropout UQ
nodes.content: Dropout retained at inference time to approximate Bayesian predictive distributions. Sensitive to dropout-rate choice; intervals can be poorly calibrated.

nodes.label: GP bias correction for plant_model
nodes.content: Gaussian Process that learns the residual between Manstein ODE predictions and observed run data. Natural Phase 2 extension that integrates with existing BO infrastructure.

nodes.label: Multi-fidelity PINN/DT integration
nodes.content: Use of Manstein ODE and Hybrid ODE+NN as low/medium-fidelity surrogates and real bioreactor runs as high-fidelity evaluations within multi-fidelity Bayesian optimization.

nodes.label: Digital Twin calibration
nodes.content: Online/offline parameter estimation and model-mismatch correction using real batch data. Required to keep the DT aligned with the physical process.

nodes.label: Universal Differential Equation (UDE)
nodes.content: Hybrid model where known mechanistic terms remain explicit and unknown terms are learned by a neural network. Bridges Manstein ODE and full PINN approaches.

nodes.label: Neural ODE
nodes.content: Learned ordinary differential equation dx/dt = f_theta(x). Can be combined with known physics (UDE) for bioreactor dynamics.

nodes.label: Kinetic Cell Model
nodes.content: Sub-model describing cell metabolism and growth kinetics. In advanced DTs it combines genome-scale metabolic networks with neural networks.

nodes.label: Reactor Model
nodes.content: Mass-balance model of batch/fed-batch/perfusion reactor volumes and concentrations due to inlet/outlet streams.

nodes.label: Extracellular Reaction Model
nodes.content: Model of abiotic reactions in culture media, e.g. glutamine degradation.

nodes.label: Model mismatch correction
nodes.content: Learned correction that refines low-fidelity digital twin or simulation predictions using real data. Essential for trustworthy multi-fidelity BO.

nodes.label: Prediction confidence score
nodes.content: Normalized score derived from model predictive uncertainty (e.g. 95% CI width). Drives Human-on-the-loop escalation for DT/BO/MPC proposals.

nodes.label: Data requirement for PINN/hybrid models
nodes.content: Industry rule-of-thumb: hybrid ODE+NN needs ~50-100 batches, pure NN needs 200-500 batches, PINN ~30-80 batches. CHO/microbial-derived figures; iPSC-native requirements are unverified and likely higher.

nodes.label: Thirugnanasambandam et al. 2025 (Comput Chem Eng)
nodes.content: Dual-ANN PINN framework for generic bioreactor modelling; shows extrapolation limits under time-varying controls.

nodes.label: Yang et al. 2024 (Ind Eng Chem Res)
nodes.content: Hybrid PINN model for large-scale pilot CHO fed-batch culture. CHO example, not directly transferable to iPSC.

nodes.label: Catalão et al. 2025 (J Process Control)
nodes.content: Bioprocess MPC with physics-informed neural networks, microbial community PHA production.

nodes.label: Patel et al. 2024 (ADCHEM)
nodes.content: MPC using physics-informed neural networks for DAE systems with ResNet + NTK training.

nodes.label: Shih, Jiang & Liang 2025 (NeurIPS / arXiv)
nodes.content: Extended Fiducial Inference for rigorous uncertainty quantification in PINNs without subjective priors/dropout rates.

nodes.label: Nobar et al. 2025 (arXiv)
nodes.content: Guided multi-fidelity Bayesian optimization with learned correction model for digital twin controller tuning.

nodes.label: Bioprocesstools 2026: AI and ML for Bioprocess Optimization
nodes.content: Industry survey of ML method data requirements for bioprocess optimization.

nodes.label: Bioprocess International 2026: Multifidelity Optimization in Biopharma
nodes.content: Case study of multi-fidelity BO in mAb process with mechanistic simulator bias up to 15%.

nodes.label: Yokogawa: Building Intelligent processes for Pharma 4.0
nodes.content: Yokogawa Insilico digital twin architecture: Reactor + Extracellular Reaction + Kinetic Cell models.

nodes.label: Pharma Manufacturing 2022: Pharma Innovation Awards
nodes.content: Yokogawa Insilico Digital Twin Factory award and up to 50% experimental effort reduction claim.
